name: policycheck
description: The ICE Symbolic Registry is a tool designed to continuously map and synchronize the semantic structure of your codebase into a durable, queryable format.

scripts.build:scanner: tsc internal/adapters/scanners/policy_scanner.ts --outDir internal/adapters/scanners --module commonjs --target es2020 --declaration false --sourceMap false --types node && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('internal/adapters/scanners/policy_scanner.cjs',{force:true}); fs.renameSync('internal/adapters/scanners/policy_scanner.js','internal/adapters/scanners/policy_scanner.cjs');"
